content:
Bacche ki uchch shiksha ke liye paisa jutaana aaj har mata-pita ki sabse badi chinta hai. Engineering ₹8-15 lakh, Medical ₹20-50 lakh, MBA ₹10-25 lakh. Abhi se planning zaroori hai.

## LIC Jeevan Tarun (Plan 734)

Sabse lachila bachcha plan. 20-24 varsh mein har saal 5%, 10%, 15%, ya 20% milta hai. Shesh 25 varsh par milta hai.

Udaharan: 5 varshiya baccha, ₹5 lakh SA, 20 varsh — anumaanitwarshik premium ₹20,000-24,000. 20-24 mein har saal ₹50,000-1,00,000. 25 par shesh + bonus.

## LIC New Children's Money Back (Plan 832)

18, 20, 22, 24 varsh par SA ka 20-20% milta hai. College admission, postgraduation, shaadi — sahi timing.

## LIC Jeevan Kishore

0-12 varsh ki aayu mein lein. 25 varsh par ekamuusht SA + bonus.

## Waiver of Premium — Zaroori Hai

Teeno plans mein yah rider zaroor lein. Mata ya pita ki mrityu ho jaaye toh bhavishya ke premium maaf ho jaate hain.

Hamare [maturity calculator](/calculators/maturity) se anumaan lagaayein. 9415313434 par Ajay sir se baat karein.
contentHi:
Bacchon ki padhai ke liye LIC ke 3 options: Jeevan Tarun (lachila), New Children's Money Back (18-24 par payout), Jeevan Kishore (lump sum). Waiver of Premium rider zaroor lein.

9415313434 par call karein.
